# Lucas Guzman — Creative Director

Lucas Guzman is a creative director offering AI-native creative direction,
content production, and visual identity services through Void Control SL.
Sectors: fintech, fashion-tech, gaming, creative agencies.

## Key pages

- [Home](https://lucasguzman.dev): Overview and positioning
- [Services](https://lucasguzman.dev/services): Detailed service offerings
- [About](https://lucasguzman.dev/about): Background, approach, and awards
- [Projects](https://lucasguzman.dev/projects): Case studies and selected work
